name: ololand-compliance-hooks
description: Drop-in compliance, citation, and provenance hooks for Anthropic's Claude Cowork finance plugins. PreToolUse MNPI guard, PostToolUse citation enforcement, audit-log writeback, tier-capacity warning, and evidence-quality warning for OloLand's IC approval gate. Populates the empty hooks/ directory Anthropic's private-equity, financial-analysis, investment-banking, equity-research, and wealth-management vertical plugins ship with.

interface.shortDescription: Compliance, citation, and provenance hooks for finance workflows.
